title: mees/calvin
abstract:
CALVIN - A benchmark for Language-Conditioned Policy Learning for Long-Horizon Robot Manipulation Tasks

# CALVIN [ ](https://github.com/psf/black) [ ](https://lgtm.com/projects/g/mees/calvin/context:python) [ ](https://lgtm.com/projects/g/mees/calvin/alerts/) [ ](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT) [ CALVIN - A benchmark for Language-Conditioned Policy Learning for Long-Horizon Robot Manipulation Tasks ](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2112.03227.pdf) [Oier Mees](https://www.oiermees.com/), [Lukas Hermann](https://lukashermann.github.io/), [Erick Rosete](https://www.erickrosete.com/), [Wolfram Burgard](http://www2.informatik.uni-freiburg.de/~burgard) #### CALVIN won the 2022 IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L) Best Paper Award! We present **CALVIN** (**C**omposing **A**ctions from **L**anguage and **Vi**sio**n**), an open-source simulated benchmark to learn long-horizon language-conditioned tasks. Our aim is to make it possible to develop agents that can solve many robotic manipulation tasks over a long horizon, from onboard sensors, and specified only via human language. CALVIN tasks are more complex in terms of sequence length, action space, and language than existing vision-and-language task datasets and supports flexible specification of sensor suites. # :computer: Quick Start To begin, clone this repository locally Install requirements: If you encounter problems installing pyhash, you might have to downgrade setuptools to a version below 58. Download dataset (choose which split you want to download with the argument `D`, `ABC` or `ABCD`): \ If you want to get started without downloading the whole dataset, use the argument `debug` to download a small debug dataset (1.3 GB). ## :weight_lifting_man: Train Baseline Agent Train baseline models: The `vision_lang_shm` option loads the CALVIN dataset into shared memory at the beginning of the training, speeding up the data loading during training. The preparation of the shared memory cache will take some time (approx. 20 min at our SLURM cluster). \ If you want to use the original data loader (e.g. for debugging) just ove
abstract_zh: 我们提出CALVIN（Composing Actions from Language and Vision），一个开源模拟基准，用于学习长时域语言条件任务。我们的目标是开发能够仅通过人类语言指定、利用机载传感器解决长时域内多种机器人操作任务的智能体。与现有的视觉与语言任务数据集相比，CALVIN任务在序列长度、动作空间和语言方面更为复杂，并支持传感器套件的灵活配置。
tldr_zh: CALVIN是一个用于长时域语言条件机器人操作任务的开源模拟基准。
cover_zh: 机器人也能听懂长指令？这个新基准让复杂操作任务更接近现实

judge.reason: 官方发布的长期语言条件操作基准，含数据集和基线，获RA-L最佳论文奖。

>[!abstract] 一句话总结：提出CALVIN，一个基于模拟器的开源基准，包含多样化操作任务和自然语言指令，支持灵活传感器配置。


# 一、动机

> 现有基准缺乏适用于长时域语言条件机器人操作任务的复杂数据集，CALVIN旨在填补这一空白。


# 二、方法

> 提出CALVIN，一个基于模拟器的开源基准，包含多样化操作任务和自然语言指令，支持灵活传感器配置。


# 三、核心实验结果

> CALVIN任务在序列长度（平均5步）、动作空间（连续动作）和语言多样性（约7000个指令）上显著超过现有视觉语言任务数据集。


# 四、对我的启发

> 仅限仿真环境，对真实世界的泛化性未验证；但可用于评估多步语言条件策略的学习能力，与机器人操作任务直接相关。
